description_long: This kiosk features a rectangular black base with a white canopy supported by four slender poles at each corner. The front display area is divided into three sections, each with a white doily-like mat and various product boxes and promotional materials arranged neatly on top. The central section includes a circular decorative element, possibly a logo or serving tray, while the side sections display boxed goods and informational placards. The canopy is flat and slightly overhangs the base, providing shade and a clean, modern appearance. The kiosk is designed for temporary or mobile use, suitable for street fairs, markets, or promotional events, and lacks any visible windows or doors.
description: A modern kiosk with a black rectangular base, white flat canopy, and neatly arranged product displays on top. The structure is open on all sides and features promotional materials and boxed goods.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the white canopy, the arrangement of product boxes, and the three display mats on the black base.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the three main display sections, the central circular element, and the clear visibility of product boxes and signage.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the kiosk, with the canopy and product arrangement visible but less detail on signage.
description_view_3: Opposite frontal view displaying the product arrangement from the other side, with the canopy and display mats visible.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign on the countertop, placed in the left display section, featuring text and graphics.
attribute_roof_design: Flat, rectangular white canopy with slight overhang, supported by four vertical poles, made of fabric or lightweight material.
